name: stash-test
description: Stash working tree changes, run a command, then pop stash in one step.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Command to run after stashing and before popping

parameters.name: -C
parameters.description: Directory to run git commands in

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses the three-step git stash + command + git stash pop pattern into one step, saving 2 agent steps per usage.
